title: Oogcentrum Baron Joostensstraat
description: A new ophthalmology clinic in Antwerp needed a full IT setup from scratch. I planned and delivered the complete environment: 2 clinic PCs, a website, and an internal cabinet app for patient flow and staff updates. For the server side, I used a compact Synology NAS because it fits the clinic size, keeps data on-premises, and is easy to maintain. I assembled and configured the PCs on-site, installed Windows 11, and set up Synology DSM with shared storage. The website includes appointment booking, doctor selection, email confirmations, reminders, and cancellation links. The admin side includes a calendar view, patient search with notes, doctor and user management, and slot scheduling. Staff can update patient status in real time during check-in and treatment flow.
